blended.narrative: Stoneham is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 40 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
